situation.headline: Iran regime paralyzed by succession crisis while Mojtaba consolidates emergency power amid ongoing US-Israeli strikes

domains.name: Iran
domains.label: regime collapse 90d
domains.status: <cite index='4-3,4-18,4-19'>Mojtaba Khamenei installed as Supreme Leader through IRGC pressure on Assembly of Experts, but faces legitimacy crisis and continuing strikes</cite>

domains.name: US Politics
domains.label: House flip Nov 26
domains.status: <cite index='11-10,13-3,13-18'>Democrats lead generic ballot by D+8 to D+11 as Trump approval falls to 40% amid Iran war backlash</cite>

domains.name: Energy
domains.label: oil shock 60d
domains.status: <cite index='19-10,21-1,21-2'>14 mb/d shut-in from Hormuz blockade creates unprecedented supply shock, prices hitting $144/bbl at peak</cite>

domains.name: US-China
domains.label: deal at April summit
domains.status: <cite index='23-11,27-6'>Summit produced underwhelming agricultural and rare earth agreements while fundamental tensions remain unresolved</cite>

domains.name: Geopolitics
domains.label: NATO cohesion degradation
domains.status: <cite index='26-11'>Trump threatens to quit NATO over alliance refusal to back US-Israeli Iran war as ties with traditional allies deteriorate</cite>

situation.unseen: <cite index='18-28,20-24'>China's dual-use technology transfers to Iran create strategic leverage while appearing to mediate, giving Beijing disproportionate influence over conflict resolution</cite>
situation.criticalWindow: <cite index='21-25,21-27'>Trump's postponed 48-hour ultimatum to Iran on Strait reopening creates recurring crisis points where miscalculation could trigger wider war</cite>
watchFor: <cite index='3-12'>Signs of Mojtaba Khamenei health complications or absence from key events</cite>
<cite index='19-8,19-9'>Oil price swings above $130/bbl indicating US-Iran deal talks breakdown</cite>
<cite index='30-6,30-19'>Cuban regime collapse indicators as oil blockade intensifies</cite>
<cite index='24-22,24-23'>Chinese military moves toward Taiwan while US forces committed in Middle East</cite>
situation.confidenceNote: <cite index='5-14,5-22'>Trump achieved step one of regime change but lacks credible day-after plan, while Khamenei succession may prove more complex than anticipated</cite>
situation.topPattern: <cite index='26-9,18-11'>US overextension in Iran creates simultaneous vulnerabilities in China deterrence, European alliance cohesion, and domestic political support</cite>

signals.headline: Khamenei Confirmed Dead
signals.summary: Killed in Feb 28 US-Israeli strikes. Internet at 1%. Protests reigniting in Ilam.
signals.signal: Succession vacuum + protest resurgence = regime stress test begins NOW.

signals.headline: 30,000+ Dead in Jan Crackdown
signals.summary: Monitors: 7,000–32,000 killed. Security forces raided hospitals to execute wounded.
signals.signal: Regime survived through mass violence. Khamenei death changes every variable.

signals.headline: SCOTUS Kills IEEPA Tariffs
signals.summary: Feb 20 ruling strips IEEPA authority. $133.5B may need refunding. China truce to Nov 10.
signals.signal: Tariff legal foundation shifted. Xi Summit timing now critical.

signals.headline: Dems +16pts in Specials
signals.summary: Fort Worth TX: 31-pt swing. 30 GOP retiring. Cook moved 18 seats toward Dems.
signals.signal: House majority in serious jeopardy. Strategy runway at risk.

signals.headline: China 15th FYP: Strategic Autarky
signals.summary: Cut tariffs on 935 high-tech inputs. Record $1.2T surplus. Rare earth controls to Nov 10.

signals.headline: NSS: US Seeks EU Fragmentation
signals.summary: First NSS openly targeting EU political trajectory. Europe accelerating independent defense.
signals.signal: Declared adversarial intent toward ally. NATO fracture is structural.

markets.label: Iran Regime Change
markets.rationale: Khamenei death + IRGC succession vacuum + protest resurgence. Security forces still nominally cohesive but structural crisis beginning.

markets.label: GOP Keeps House
markets.rationale: +16pt special election overperformance, 30 GOP retirements, 42% approval. Historical patterns confirm House flip is base case.

markets.label: US-China Trade Deal
markets.rationale: IEEPA ruling weakened leverage. China building autarky. November truce expiry forces confrontation, not resolution.

markets.label: Oil >$100/bbl
markets.rationale: Khamenei death + Hormuz threat premium + 1.3M bbl/day Iranian supply at risk. Supply shock scenario elevated.

markets.label: Ukraine Ceasefire
markets.rationale: Trump wants exit. Ukraine exhausted. Europe pushing. Russia sees no urgency while winning slowly.

markets.label: Trump Approval >50%
markets.rationale: Currently 42%, declining. Iran strikes alienating isolationists. No structural path to 50%+ visible.

watchSignals: Who fills Khamenei succession — IRGC hardliner or reformist?
Does IRGC splinter or close ranks after decapitation?
China's response to Iran strikes — how strong?
Oil markets reacting to Iranian chaos?
Cuba economic collapse signals as Venezuela oil cuts?
April Xi Summit prep — concession vs hardline?
